# Return deadline reminder

You may request a refund within 30 days of receiving your item, defining the return-window. Refunds follow the standard process: support reviews within 3 business days, and approved refunds reach the original payment method within 5–7 business days (see refund-processing-timeline). Non-defective returns incur an NT$80 deduction from the refund (the non-defective-return-fee).

[Source: returns_reminder.md#return-deadline-reminder]

See also [[return-shipping-guide]].
